_comment: ❌ BAD HOOKS EXAMPLE — Score: ~3/20 pts (Grade F)

_notes.H1.2: ❌ 'PreToolCall' is not a valid event type — should be 'PreToolUse'
_notes.H2.1: ❌ Hardcoded API key 'sk-abc123def456' in command string
_notes.H2.2: ❌ No set -e or trap — script will silently fail
_notes.H3.1: ❌ Matcher '.*' matches ALL tool uses — runs on every single action
_notes.H3.2: ❌ No description field — no way to know what this hook is for
